# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            choices: ['registry1.company.com', 'registry2.company.com', 'registry3.company.com'],
            description: 'Select the target registry URL'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Enter the image tag'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'my-app',
            description: 'Enter the image name'
        )
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build and Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def imageName = "${REGISTRY_URL}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    sh "docker build -t ${imageName} ."
                    sh "docker push ${imageName}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
